texto: Memories are interesting. Interesting because they are faded yet detailed, pictured yet difficult to decipher, yelling yet mute, beautiful yet dreadful, magical yet logical, and familiar yet new. We listen; we encounter; we observe; we do; we learn; and, we talk. Everything we do or experience becomes our memory. Indeed, memories are interesting.
explicacao: Citação de Suyog Ketkar sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “Memories are interesting. Interesting because they are faded yet detailed, pictured yet difficult…” articula motivacao, inspirational-quotes, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
